title: Minecraft Movie Memes
description: Adds sounds effects from the Minecraft Movie to certain actions in-game.
body:
![The title of the project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbb0a288c59ed5a4ee41426a7e40270700cafabc.png)

This pack adds various sounds for doing certain actions in-game. The following sounds and their respective actions are listed below:
- **Flint and steel** for equiping a flint and steel in your mainhand.
- **Ender pearl** for equiping an ender pearl in your mainhand.
- **Water bucket, release!** for emptying a water bucket.
- **This... is a crafting table** for placing a crafting table.
- **Kadoosh!** for interacting with a crafting table.
- **Chicken jockey!** for getting hit by a chicken jockey.
- **The Nether!** for entering the nether.
- **Diamond armor; full set** for equipping full diamond armor.
- **Elytra wingsuits!** for equipping an elytra.
- **Comin' in hot!** for falling faster than 30 blocks/second.
- **Lava chicken song** for a chicken being burnt in lava or playing the Cat music disc.
- **Pink sheep speak spanish** when nearing them.

## FAQs
**Will applying this data pack and resource pack to my world alter it significantly?**
> No, the data pack only detects for things and plays sounds. So, you are safe to add and remove the pack from your worlds.

**Do you regret making this pack?**
> Yes.
#
Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/minecraft-movie-memes/)
